name: Cascais
approachNote: WPT 38°41'·28N 09°24'·57W, 334°/4ca to CC2 buoy and on the 285° ldg line. Beware shoal, least depth 1.4m extending approx 45m NW from the bkwtr head into the hbr ent.
shelter: Good in marina or on outer pontoons. North of marina in designated area 3-5m, good except in E winds/strong SW'lies.

marina.name: Marina de Cascais
marina.notes: 650 inc 125 visitors €3·00 (inc V) +50%. Multihulls +50%. 0900-2000. Mail pickup: Casa de S. Bernardo. Town all amenities; rail to Lisboa (½hr) every ¼hr 0530-0230.

name: Lisboa
approachNote: WPT 38°36'·90N 09°22'·90W (5ca SE of No 2 buoy) 047°/5·4M to abeam No 5 buoy. Main DW chan Barra Sul into R Tejo proper; shoals lie on either side in strong onshore winds. Tidal streams reach 5kn in the river; ebb sets S of Forte de Bugio. Cross-current at ent to marinas. Speed limit E of Torre de Belém 10kn, but 5kn within 300m of shore. From N/NW keep at least 5ca off Cabo da Roca (see Area map for TSS); magnetic anomalies 3M SSE of Cabo Raso can alter local variation by +5° to −3°.
shelter: Good in the marinas along the N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Oeiras Marina
marina.notes: 400 (inc V) €2·50 multihulls +100%. 0800-2200. Fast trains to Lisboa 16km; see Cascais. Marinas A-D run by Lisboa Port Authority (www.portodelisboa.pt, tel 3611000). Average cost €2·25.

name: Doca de Bom Sucesso
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Doca de Bom Sucesso
marina.notes: 160 mostly local yachts. F&A in 3m. Bus to Lisboa.

name: Doca de Belém
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Doca de Belém
marina.notes: 189 yachts, few visitors. F&A in 3m. Bus to Lisboa.

name: Doca de Santo Amaro
approachNote: Few visitors in 4m. Bus 2M to city centre. Below suspension bridge (noise from road and night life).
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Doca de Santo Amaro
marina.notes: 190 (few visitors) in 4m. Bus 2M to city centre. Below suspension bridge.

name: Doca de Alcântara
approachNote: Chan turns W into marina at dock end; swing bridge open 1900-0700, then every H and H+½. Bus 2M to city.
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Doca de Alcântara
marina.notes: 370 F&A inc visitors in 8m. Bus 2M to city.

name: Marina Parque das Nações
approachNote: S of Vasco de Gama bridge. Some parts of marina rptd silted (2018) — call Ch 09 for berthing guidance.
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Marina Parque das Nações
marina.notes: 400 (inc V) €2·50, multihulls +50%. Some parts silted (2018); call Ch 09 for berthing guidance.

name: Centro Náutico de Algés Boatyard
approachNote: Between Oeiras and Torre de Belém.
shelter: Good in marina along N bank of R Tejo.

marina.name: Centro Náutico de Algés Boatyard
marina.notes: 300+ berths. Between Oeiras and Torre de Belém.

name: Tagus Yacht Centre
approachNote: Seixal Bay 38°38'·07N 09°06'·77W. Ferries: Seixal to Lisboa.

marina.name: Tagus Yacht Centre
marina.notes: 70 berths. Seixal Bay. Ferries: Seixal to Lisboa.

name: Alvor Anchorage
approachNote: Between moles Fl R 4s & G 4s, not in strong onshore winds or at night. Anchor just inside ent to port in about 2-2m or off Alvor (1-2M E) in about 1-6m. Channel is buoyed but sandbanks frequently move; best to enter on the young flood whilst the drying banks can be seen. Beware Aquatic Revival Park S of Alvor centred on 37°05'·75N 08°35'·09W, marked with 4 Y special marks.
shelter: A peaceful but shallow lagoon. Not for strong onshore winds or at night.

name: Portimão
approachNote: WPT 37°06'·04N 08°31'·94W, 021°/5ca to hbr ent. Beware artificial reef W of Portimão, approx 1M SSW of Ponta do Faco (marked by four Y lit bys). Seaplane operating area approx 1·5M SW of hbr ent. Beyond W molhe stay on ldg line until past No 2 buoy, due to shifting sandbank just inside ent. River is straightforward but flood and ebb streams run hard; berth bows to the stream. Caution: 2 low (1·4m cl'nce) fixed road/rail bridges N of Portimão centre.
shelter: Good in marina on W bank. Good anchorage off Ferragudo. Anchor inside E molhe in about 4m, prone to swell and FV wash.

marina.name: Marina de Portimão
marina.notes: 620 inc visitors €3·75; max LOA 50m, draft 4.5m, multihulls +50%. Root N bkwtr. Fishing Hbr 300t/9m beam. Town 20 mins walk, bus every 10 mins summer, taxis/car hire at marina. Wide choice of shops/restaurants. Bus/rail to Faro (65km).
